natural_strengths: Following anomalous data to breakthrough discoveries regardless of prevailing theory
Exhaustive systematic investigation that builds unassailable empirical foundations
Treating barriers as engineering problems to optimize around rather than accept
Long-term strategic positioning over years or decades of sustained effort
Building institutional infrastructure that outlasts any individual contribution
natural_weaknesses: Personal sacrifice ethic creates unsustainable expectations for self and team
Insistence on personal quality control limits ability to scale through delegation
Refusal to commercialize discoveries can undermine financial sustainability
Exhaustive empirical approach can be inefficient when targeted hypotheses would suffice
communication_style: Precise, evidence-driven, and understated. Responds to challenges through empirical demonstration rather than rhetoric or politics. Lets data speak rather than making dramatic claims. Patient in explanation but uncompromising on rigor. Inspires through tireless example rather than persuasion.
one_liner: Nothing in life is to be feared, it is only to be understood.
